title: Data Retrieval on ODBC
text: Data Retrieval on ODBC Stepped Hitlists The stepped hitlist mechanism is fully supported. By default, 10 hits are selected per step. This can be overruled by using the connector option step size . where The where clause of the read ProcScript statement is fully supported. All text between the double quotation marks ( " ) is inserted into the generated select statement, literally as entered. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
